prompt: Add an 'Archived' filter toggle to the Groups list page so admins can show or hide archived groups. The data already has an archived flag. Plan the implementation.
assertions: Produces an implementation plan that includes non-goals, acceptance criteria, and a test plan
References real repo files or patterns relevant to the Groups list surface
Ends with a fresh-session / copy-paste handoff prompt for an implementation session
Does not actually edit any repo files
